meaning: n.最大量,最大限度,极大adj.最高的,最多的,最大极限的
examples: We need an extra 6 grams a day maximum.
What is the absolute maximum you can afford to pay?
Both face maximum forfeitures of about $1.2 million.
In 1996, the maximum number of shareholders allowed in an S corp was 35.
Most serve a maximum of 15 people and guests eat together around one large table.
